registryOpen.resolution: Canonical texts updated in the ai-knowledge-os delivery stream to state the recorded supersession. Remaining open items tracked as paywall-live-conditions.
registryOpen.statement: CLAUDE.md Twinzy constraint #1, rules/00 rule 42, and all agent mirrors still said "no payment capture ever", while an owner-approved 2026-07-12 supersession (docs/features/paypal-donations-and-paid-results/ 22-go-no-go.md: SANDBOX-GO, LIVE-conditional) shipped an env-gated PayPal Orders v2 paywall (capture-at-consumption, no persistence, webhooks optional). Policy texts are being updated to the recorded decision; the paywall stays OFF by default (blank credentials = free).

registryOpen.resolution: Do not set PAYPAL_ENV=live or ship paywall-on config until all four conditions are recorded as met and the copy revision is owner-approved.
registryOpen.statement: LIVE paywall is NOT approved. 22-go-no-go.md records four open LIVE conditions: deployed HTTPS origin; PayPal Business account + PAYPAL_ENV=live only after sandbox sign-off; owner-approved revision of the "completely free / never ask for payment details" copy in en+ar (i18n messages still claim free while payment-step copy charges {price}); a recorded live smoke test. Commit 5cd43f6 documents a premature live attempt failing with COMPLIANCE_VIOLATION.

registryOpen.resolution: Backfill compact artifacts or record an owner-approved waiver.
registryOpen.statement: The paywall program shipped with 6 of the required phase artifacts (00, 06, 19-threat-model x2, 22, 25); phases 03/08/09/10/11/12/13/15/17/23 are missing per CLAUDE.md's artifact policy. Process debt to backfill.
